title: Starter Show Floor Circuit
description: Collect two quick passport stamps from sample-map exhibitors and learn what each booth is showing.

stops.clueText: Start with assorted PCs, phones, and repairable electronics.
stops.goalText: Ask what unusual portable or repairable find is on the table today.

stops.clueText: Find the homebrew game booth and look for a playable demo.
stops.goalText: Ask which demo is newest and what system it targets.

reward.description: 30 points for completing the starter show floor circuit

completionText: Starter circuit complete. You found two different ways exhibitors bring the show floor to life.
